title: Tad Darkpass
bodyText:
Brolin's younger brother — the favorite. Captain-of-the-football-team energy. Sent by Root into the Underdark "to look into some things." **Missing**: his +1 warhammer (Darkpass crest) was found at an abandoned, struggle-marked camp with drag marks leading deeper (S13). Portrait: art/tad-darkpass.jpg
